project_overview.name: LinkPlay
project_overview.description: A cinematic Terabox video player where users paste a link and the video plays instantly.
project_overview.theme: Cinematic Dark Mode (Strictly no purple gradients)

fonts.usage: Link Input, Technical Data, File Size, Quota Numbers

rules: Backgrounds must be deeply dark off-black, never pure black.
Use Electric Crimson (#E63946) for primary actions (Play, Paste, Subscribe).
Use Cinematic Gold (#FACC15) for Pro Tier badges and highlights.
No generic gradients. Use solid colors with texture or subtle glows.

layout.spacing: Generous scaling: p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16. Containers must have internal padding.
layout.grid_system: Bento grid for Video Info and History. High-density for details, wide gaps for sections.
layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content, avoid center-aligning everything.

header.style: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/5
header.elements: Logo, Daily Quota Indicator (e.g. 2/3 Free Links), 'Upgrade to Pro' CTA button.

hero_input.style: Massive text input using JetBrains Mono. High contrast focus state with glowing ring focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E63946]/50. Button integrated into the input line.
hero_input.behavior: When link is pasted, smoothly transitions and reveals the video player canvas.

video_player.style: Cinematic UI: Full width container, rounded-xl, deep shadow. Playback controls fade out. Neon/colorful accents for progress bar.
video_player.elements: Video Canvas, Custom HTML5 Controls (Play, Progress, Volume, Fullscreen).

video_info_bento.style: Neumorphic / Sharp edge flat surfaces (bg-[#0C0C0E] border border-white/5).
video_info_bento.elements: Thumbnail Image, Video Title, File Size (JetBrains Mono), Download Button.

history_section.style: Minimalist list of recently played links with timestamps. Hover effects on list items.
history_section.elements: Link text, time ago, replay action.

pricing_pro_card.style: Tracing beam or high-contrast border. Dark background with glowing gold accents.
pricing_pro_card.details: ₹49/month, Unlimited Links, HD Quality, Fast Download. 'Get Pro' button opens Auth Modal.

auth_modal.style: Shadcn Dialog. Dark glass overlay. Form fields use Shadcn Input.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons lift (-translate-y-1) and increase brightness. Text colors explicitly set on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform, transition-opacity, transition-colors). NO 'transition-all'.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle entrance stagger for history list items.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings.
Implement the font imports inside src/index.css.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and backdrop blurs.
Do NOT use pure transparent overlays. Always use a blur or semi-solid scrim.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } MUST be removed or avoided).
Ensure all buttons are explicitly styled for hover, active, and focus states (higher contrast on focus).
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. No emoji icons.
Follow the specified color palette. No purple gradients.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup global fonts in index.css: Cabinet Grotesk, JetBrains Mono, Outfit.
2. Configure Tailwind config with the specified cinematic dark mode colors (avoiding purple entirely).
3. Build the Navigation Bar (Glassmorphism) with Logo, Quota Indicator, and Upgrade CTA.
4. Build the Hero Section featuring a large, dominant 'Paste Terabox Link' input field.
5. Implement a mock Inline Video Player that appears after link submission, styled cinematically.
6. Build a Bento-style Grid below the player for Video Metadata (Title, Size, Thumbnail) and Download button.
7. Build the Recently Played Links History section.
8. Build a visually striking Pro Tier Pricing Card (₹49/month) utilizing the neon movie sign image for flair.
9. Create the Auth Modal (Login/Signup) triggered solely by the Pro subscription flow.
10. Ensure all components use 'data-testid' and adhere to the strict spacing/typography rules.
